scope: Local labels and transcript field contracts for draft-hyprstream-privacypass-pqhybrid-00. This is not an IANA, MOQT, or Privacy Pass codepoint registry and allocates no wire values.

canonicalization.encoding: construction-selected deterministic binary encoding; this registry does not yet select CBOR, Cap'n Proto, TLS presentation language, or another wire encoding
canonicalization.identifiers: construction-selected representation and normalization; this registry only names logical identifier values and forbids implicit normalization
canonicalization.integers: construction-selected representation and width; numeric minimum and maximum entries are semantic bounds only
canonicalization.octets: construction-selected container representation; octet limits are pre-cryptographic resource ceilings, not a serialization choice
canonicalization.digest: construction-selected algorithm, representation, and exact length; all are mandatory before production
canonicalization.boundary: value_class describes pre-serialization semantics only; no entry in this registry selects a wire encoding, scalar serialization, normalization form, or codepoint

labels.purpose: Binds a future issuance challenge to issuer, audience, accepted state, policy, and selected suite.
Separates an anonymous issuance transcript from redemption and token binding.
Binds a one-use anonymous capability to its exact origin authorization context.
Binds a redemption to a fresh proof-of-possession and HyKEM recipient without naming a holder DID.
Binds anonymous authorization to canonical unary request and response-recipient fields.
Binds encrypted ordinary application control Objects to an outer MOQT session while preserving relay opacity.
Binds exact response, stream, or group key-package release to the verified capability and recipient.

issuer_id.selection_requirement: exact resolved accepted-current issuer identifier; construction selects representation

audience.selection_requirement: exact origin identifier; construction selects representation and no URL normalization is implicit

suite_id.selection_requirement: construction-selected reviewed suite name; unknown values reject

accepted_state_digest.selection_requirement: algorithm, representation, and exact size selected by accepted-current state profile

expiry.selection_requirement: semantic Unix seconds; construction selects representation and origin defines accepted clock skew

challenge_nonce.selection_requirement: uniform random logical octet value; construction selects representation

challenge_digest.selection_requirement: digest of the construction-selected challenge encoding

issuance_request.selection_requirement: construction-defined opaque request value and representation

issuance_response.selection_requirement: construction-defined opaque response value and representation

redemption_context.selection_requirement: origin-generated opaque logical value; construction selects representation

token_nonce.selection_requirement: one-use token identifier; construction selects representation and raw value is never logged

redemption_digest.selection_requirement: digest of the construction-selected redemption encoding

carrier_profile.selection_requirement: one exact profile-vocabulary carrier value; construction selects representation

session_transcript_digest.selection_requirement: digest of the carrier handshake/session transcript under the selected construction

operation.selection_requirement: exact construction-defined action identifier and representation

resource_commitment.selection_requirement: commitment to the construction-selected resource/action encoding

pop_public_key.selection_requirement: construction-selected fresh one-use public key and representation

hykem_recipient.selection_requirement: accepted-current recipient material in construction-selected representation; no test-store fallback

one_use_nonce.selection_requirement: fresh random logical octet value; construction selects representation

binding_digest.selection_requirement: digest of the construction-selected binding encoding

service.selection_requirement: exact service identifier; construction selects representation

method.selection_requirement: exact method identifier; construction selects representation

request_nonce.selection_requirement: fresh logical nonce value; construction selects representation

response_hykem_recipient.selection_requirement: fresh response recipient material in construction-selected representation

moqt_session_transcript_digest.selection_requirement: digest of the exact MOQT session transcript under the selected construction

outer_admission_class.selection_requirement: exact coarse-admission result only; construction selects representation

release_kind.selection_requirement: one of unary-response, stream-epoch, or group-epoch; construction selects representation

direction.selection_requirement: exact construction-defined direction identifier and representation

recipient_key_id.selection_requirement: exact accepted-current purpose-separated recipient key identifier; construction selects representation
